not_claimed: ordinary list decoding beyond the stated interleaved-list predicate

theorem_assessment.reason_not_proved: The certified schedules are extracted from Sage RREF pivot rows. The tested rank-free metadata rules all selected singular minors.
theorem_assessment.target_statement: For every reduced matrix in the support_overlap_rref_pivot class, a deterministic support-overlap schedule selects a full column-rank minor over GF(17^32).
